response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and identified multiple performers: Momosuzu Nene, Tokoyami Towa, and Shishiro Botan. 2. Identified two songs. First, a short clip of 'Nenene Nenene Nenene! Daibakusou'. Second, a full performance of 'Aozora no Rhapsody'. 3. Researched 'Aozora no Rhapsody' (Original artist fhána, lyrics Hideki Hayashi, music Junichi Sato). 4. Found official lyrics for 'Aozora no Rhapsody'. 5. As per instructions, searched for lyrics using the original composer's name (Junichi Sato) and song title, resulting in accurate finds. Lyrics for the first song were not found in the initial search attempt as it is a short, original song specific to the performer, so it was set to null. 6. Structured the data into the final JSON format.
response.global_summary: This video is a performance featuring VTubers from hololive. The first part is a short segment of 'Nenene Nenene Nenene! Daibakusou' performed by Momosuzu Nene. The second, longer part is a performance of 'Aozora no Rhapsody' (originally by fhána) performed by Momosuzu Nene, Tokoyami Towa, and Shishiro Botan.

scenes.description: The video begins with a performance of 'Nenene Nenene Nenene! Daibakusou' by Momosuzu Nene. It shows her on a 3D stage. This segment is very short.

The performance of 'Aozora no Rhapsody' begins. The performers are Momosuzu Nene, Tokoyami Towa, and Shishiro Botan. The stage features bright, colorful decorations. Text on screen identifies the song as 'Aozora no Rhapsody', with lyrics by Hideki Hayashi and music by Junichi Sato.
scenes.performer_in_video: Momosuzu Nene, Tokoyami Towa, Shishiro Botan

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
chu chu yeah! please me! chu chu yeah! without you
Ah! What's this, a trivial mistake?
I'm fiddling with things of my own
Why so sudden? It's fine to just run away, right?
But somehow, I'm in a whim mode
And I ended up in that mood
It started like that
In short, it doesn't seem like me
But now I open the door and look, I can hear your voice
Come on! Let's go! Anywhere!
I have the courage to become your wings!
(please stay with me)
I'm not afraid of any trials
Because I have that magic
(Congratulations, no matter what!)
Let's give a bouquet to the world we meet for the first time
(made in society)
Just in this moment, we are connected
Incoherent communication?
But I don't care
As long as it's peaceful from tomorrow!
chu chu yeah! without you!
Ah! Why can't I be honest again?
I'm blowing fire with my own things
Gear is as is, let's turn up the speed
But somehow, I'm in a twilight mode
And I ended up remembering someday
Even if I'm alone, it's not bad
I don't have to rely on anyone
But I want to hear the noisy voice beyond the door
Now! Let's go! Anywhere!
I will carry you on my back and fly in the sky!
(please fly with me)
Even if our hearts drift apart someday, at that time, keep smiling
(Congratulations, no matter what)
In this world I want to protect, an Aozora no Rhapsody
(make me rhapsodic!)
Just keep playing it forever
Uneven combination?
But it's fine, tomorrow will be peaceful again!
Expose a tiny wound to the sun
I shared it with you
The pain dissolves into the heat!

please me! Clap your hands

I have the courage to become your wings!
(please stay with me)
I'm not afraid of any trials
Because I have that magic
(Congratulations, no matter what)
I met you and the world was filled with bouquets

Just in that moment, we were connected
Incoherent communication?
But I don't care
